title: Tom Lee says 'crypto spring' started as largest Ethereum treasury buys $238 million in ether
author: Sigma Capital
metaDescription: Ethereum treasury Bitmine bought $238 million worth of ether, marking the start of "crypto spring" according to Chairman Tom Lee. Bitmine now holds 5.18 million
excerpt: Ethereum treasury Bitmine bought $238 million worth of ether, marking the start of "crypto spring" according to Chairman Tom Lee. Bitmine now holds 5.18 million ETH, generating nearly $300 million in annualized revenue.

content.introduction: Ethereum treasury Bitmine bought $238 million worth of ether, marking the start of "crypto spring" according to Chairman Tom Lee. Bitmine now holds 5.18 million ETH, generating nearly $300 million in annualized revenue.
body: Tom Lee says 'crypto spring' started as largest Ethereum treasury buys $238 million in ether. 1 view · 10 minutes ago. #crypto #bitcoin #
Bitmine now holds 5.18 million ETHs and consolidates its status as the world's largest Ethereum treasury. CEO Tom Lee speaks of "Krypto Spring".
